title: leucanthemopsis alpina subsp. tomentosa
intro: Leucanthemopsis alpina subsp. tomentosa, also known as Alpine Daisy or Woolly Alpine Daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemopsis alpina subsp. tomentosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
